'''Umjing Baab''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rughja]] who led an orchestra-[[Band/Legends|band]] called [[Umjing Baab and His Swinging Trio]]—which, despite its name, was made up of Baab and only two, not three, other [[Musician/Legends|musicians]]. Since he, like the rest of his band, was a fifteen-limbed [[Rughja]], he could play the [[Kloo horn/Legends|kloo horn]], the [[Nalargon/Legends|nalargon]], and at least eight other instruments simultaneously.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
